user_task_description: This contract excerpt contains payment clauses and schedule notes that may not agree with each other.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Identify the conflict in the payment terms and explain which clauses or schedule entries are inconsistent with one another.
atomic_scope: Only reasoning over internal document consistency is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A concise explanation of the conflicting provisions.

inspired_by.title: How do you edit a pdf document while keeping everything the same font and layout exactly?

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- The PDF mixes clause text with schedule summaries
- There is no explicit correction note inside the contract body
- The layout is slightly messy and could be reorganized, but that is not the explicit request
